title: The Insect Woman
overview: A woman, Tome, is born to a lower class family in Japan in 1918. The title refers to an insect, repeating its mistakes, as in an infinite circle. Imamura, with this metaphor, introduces the life of Tome, who keeps trying to change her poor life.

trailers.title: La Femme Insecte (reprise 2018 - Imamura) Bande-annonce
trailers.channel_name: Tempête de bandes-annonces sur le Web
